scores.correctness_notes: Covers all core points: juju.integrate(), juju.remove_relation(), AppStatusRelation fields (related_app, interface, scope), and waiting for active status as implicit verification. Misses the via parameter for cross-model relations, actions pattern, and CLI fallback, but all stated facts are accurate.
scores.hallucination_notes: none — is_active and is_blocked appear to be legitimate AppStatus convenience properties; AppStatusRelation fields match the gold standard exactly; all API names (integrate, remove_relation, status) are correct
